simple_types.name: CRCCNF_SKIPADDR_Field
simple_types.code:
type CRCCNF_SKIPADDR_Field is
   Include,
   Skip)
  with Size => 1;

enumeration_literals.name: Include
enumeration_literals.description:
Packet address is skipped in CRC calculation. The CRC calculation will
start at the first byte after the address.

simple_types.name: STATE_STATE_Field
simple_types.code:
type STATE_STATE_Field is
   Disabled,
   Rxru,
   Rxidle,
   Rx,
   Rxdisable,
   Txru,
   Txidle,
   Tx,
   Txdisable)
  with Size => 4;

enumeration_literals.name: Disabled
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Rx Ramp Up state.

enumeration_literals.name: Rxru
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Rx Idle state.

enumeration_literals.name: Rxidle
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Rx state.

enumeration_literals.name: Rx
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Rx Disable state.

enumeration_literals.name: Rxdisable
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Tx Ramp Up state.

enumeration_literals.name: Txru
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Tx Idle state.

enumeration_literals.name: Txidle
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Tx state.

enumeration_literals.name: Tx
enumeration_literals.description: Radio is in the Tx Disable state.

record_types.name: CRCCNF_Register

fields.name: Reserved_2_7
fields.description:
Leave packet address field out of the CRC calculation. Decision
point: START task.

CRCPOLY_Register

DACNF_Register
DACNF_TXADD_Field

DAP_Register
DATAWHITEIV_Register

fields.name: Reserved_28_30
fields.description: Enable or disable override of default trim values.

record_types.name: PCNF0_Register

fields.name: Reserved_4_7
fields.description: Length of S0 field in number of bytes. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: Reserved_9_15
fields.description: Length of S1 field in number of bits. Decision point: START task.

record_types.name: PCNF1_Register

fields.name: MAXLEN
fields.description: Static length in number of bytes. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: STATLEN
fields.description: Base address length in number of bytes. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: Reserved_19_23
fields.description: On air endianness of packet length field. Decision point: START task.

record_types.name: POWER_Register
PREFIX0_Register
PREFIX1_Register
RADIO_Peripheral

fields.name: TASKS_DISABLE
fields.description: Start the RSSI and take one sample of the receive signal strength.

fields.name: EVENTS_DISABLED
fields.description: A device address match occurred on the last received packet.

fields.name: EVENTS_DEVMATCH
fields.description: No device address match occurred on the last received packet.

fields.name: EVENTS_DEVMISS
fields.description:
Sampling of the receive signal strength complete. A new RSSI sample
is ready for readout at the RSSISAMPLE register.

fields.name: EVENTS_RSSIEND
fields.description: Bit counter reached bit count value specified in BCC register.

fields.name: DAI
fields.description: Packet pointer. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: PCNF1
fields.description: Radio base address 0. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: BASE0
fields.description: Radio base address 1. Decision point: START task.

fields.name: BASE1
fields.description: Prefixes bytes for logical addresses 0 to 3.

fields.name: PREFIX0
fields.description: Prefixes bytes for logical addresses 4 to 7.

record_types.name: RSSISAMPLE_Register
RXADDRESSES_ADDR_Field
RXADDRESSES_Register
RXCRC_Register
RXMATCH_Register
SHORTS_Register

fields.name: READY_START
fields.description: Shortcut between END event and DISABLE task.

fields.name: END_DISABLE
fields.description: Shortcut between DISABLED event and TXEN task.

fields.name: DISABLED_TXEN
fields.description: Shortcut between DISABLED event and RXEN task.

fields.name: DISABLED_RXEN
fields.description: Shortcut between ADDRESS event and RSSISTART task.

fields.name: ADDRESS_RSSISTART
fields.description: Shortcut between END event and START task.

fields.name: END_START
fields.description: Shortcut between ADDRESS event and BCSTART task.

fields.name: Reserved_7_7
fields.description: Shortcut between DISABLED event and RSSISTOP task.

record_types.name: STATE_Register
TEST_Register

fields.name: CONSTCARRIER
fields.description: PLL lock. Decision point: TXEN or RXEN task.

record_types.name: TIFS_Register
TXADDRESS_Register
TXPOWER_Register

variables.name: RADIO_Periph
variables.code:
RADIO_Periph : aliased RADIO_Peripheral
  with Import, Address => RADIO_Base;
